divergences: desktop wallpaper approximated with CSS radial/linear gradients; reference is a photographic abstract 3D render with sharp ribbon shapes that cannot be reproduced exactly (dominant residual in RMSE)

NSVisualEffectView menu material emulated with backdrop-filter blur+saturate plus a neutral bias wash calibrated against sampled interior colors (saturate 1.3 instead of token 2.6 to match the JPEG's desaturated interior)
emoji glyphs rendered as native Apple Color Emoji at 28px; sub-pixel glyph rasterization differs slightly from the GPUI capture
selected-cell border approximated as 1px rgba(215,165,90,0.75) ring sampled from JPEG (JPEG chroma bleed makes the exact native accent color ambiguous)
header chip icons (tab-pin, send-up) and footer return-arrow drawn as inline SVG approximations of the native glyphs
font antialiasing / SF Pro browser rasterization differs from native CoreText
